description: Internal service dashboard for bounded technical point drilldown over ClickHouse read models. Not tenant-facing.

targets.rawSql: WITH (SELECT greatest(coalesce(max(value_float), 1), 1) FROM telemetry_events_dedup_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND value_type = 'number' AND value_float IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter_ms(ts)) AS bool_scale SELECT ts AS time, concat(point_ref, ' boolean high/low') AS metric, if(value_bool, bool_scale, 0) AS value FROM telemetry_events_dedup_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND value_type = 'boolean' AND value_bool IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter_ms(ts) ORDER BY time ASC, metric ASC LIMIT 5000

SELECT ts AS time, point_ref AS metric, value_float AS value FROM telemetry_events_dedup_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND value_type = 'number' AND value_float IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter_ms(ts) ORDER BY time ASC, metric ASC LIMIT 5000

panels.description: Latest values for the selected raw technical point identity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts, tenant_id, asset_id, source_type, agent_id, source_id, point_key, value_type, coalesce(toString(value_float), toString(value_bool), value_string, value_raw) AS value, quality, source_config_revision FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) ORDER BY ts DESC, point_key ASC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Latest values

targets.rawSql: SELECT quality, count() AS events FROM telemetry_events_dedup_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter_ms(ts) GROUP BY quality ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT event_type, count() AS events FROM telemetry_events_dedup_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter_ms(ts) GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT bucket_start AS time, 'events' AS metric, uniqMerge(event_count_state) AS value FROM service_telemetry_activity_1m_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter_ms(bucket_start) GROUP BY bucket_start ORDER BY bucket_start ASC LIMIT 1000

panels.description: Agent/source status context is empty-state tolerant when no operational status events have been seeded.

targets.rawSql: SELECT scope, tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, state, reason, ts, dashboard_state, context_source FROM (SELECT 'agent' AS scope, tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, '' AS source_id, status AS state, '' AS reason, last_status_ts AS ts, if(last_status_ts < now64(3) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE, 'stale', status) AS dashboard_state, 'service_latest_agent_status_v1' AS context_source FROM (SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, argMaxMerge(status_state) AS status, maxMerge(last_status_ts_state) AS last_status_ts FROM service_latest_agent_status_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id) UNION ALL SELECT 'source' AS scope, tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, state, reason, last_state_ts AS ts, if(last_state_ts < now64(3) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE, 'stale', state) AS dashboard_state, 'service_latest_source_connection_v1' AS context_source FROM (SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, argMaxMerge(state_state) AS state, argMaxMerge(reason_state) AS reason, maxMerge(last_state_ts_state) AS last_state_ts FROM service_latest_source_connection_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id) UNION ALL SELECT 'point_inventory' AS scope, tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, 'telemetry_inferred' AS state, 'latest telemetry freshness fallback' AS reason, last_seen AS ts, if(last_seen < now64(3) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE, 'stale', 'connected') AS dashboard_state, 'service_point_inventory_v1' AS context_source FROM (SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, maxMerge(last_seen_state) AS last_seen FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id)) ORDER BY scope ASC, ts DESC LIMIT 40

panels.title: Runtime status context

list.definition: SELECT tenant_id FROM service_point_inventory_v1 GROUP BY tenant_id ORDER BY tenant_id LIMIT 200
list.name: tenant_id
list.query: SELECT tenant_id FROM service_point_inventory_v1 GROUP BY tenant_id ORDER BY tenant_id LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT asset_id FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY asset_id ORDER BY asset_id LIMIT 200
list.name: asset_id
list.query: SELECT asset_id FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY asset_id ORDER BY asset_id LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT source_type FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY source_type ORDER BY source_type LIMIT 100
list.name: source_type
list.query: SELECT source_type FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY source_type ORDER BY source_type LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT agent_id FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) GROUP BY agent_id ORDER BY agent_id LIMIT 200
list.name: agent_id
list.query: SELECT agent_id FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) GROUP BY agent_id ORDER BY agent_id LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT source_id FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY source_id ORDER BY source_id LIMIT 200
list.name: source_id
list.query: SELECT source_id FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY source_id ORDER BY source_id LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT point_key FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY point_key ORDER BY point_key LIMIT 500
list.name: point_key
list.query: SELECT point_key FROM service_point_inventory_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY point_key ORDER BY point_key LIMIT 500

title: Telemetry Point Drilldown
